title: CNC Machinist 1st Shift
description: Set up and operate conventional and CNC machine tools to produce precision parts and verify dimensions to meet print specifications. Machines include lathes, horizontal and vertical mills, multi-axis CNC machining centers, precision internal/external grinders, and CURVIC coupling grinders.

title: Manufacturing Assistant
description: Machine Operator Assistant’s role is to help keep the department running efficiently by staging work for the machines and by caring for the machine fluids (lubricants and coolant).

title: Production Planner I
description: The Production Planner I will develop and maintain short, mid and long-term production plans for The Gleason Works in support of a specified business or manufacturing area.  The production plans will support the fulfillment of manufacturing, assembly or sales order demands.  Participate in business projects and initiate process improvement suggestions.
